ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Shao (ÂæêÁ¥π). Captured by Jin but sent back as an envoy. Made the mistake of praising Jin and was executed by Sun Hao. Xu Shao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
